arabic:
وعنه قال‏:‏ سمعت خليلي صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول‏:‏ ‏
"‏تبلغ الحلية من المؤمن حيث يبلغ الوضوء‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: I heard my Khalil (the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)) as saying, "The adornment of the believer (in Jannah) will reach the places where the water of Wudu' reaches (his body).".
